rule: Active nav item must be clearly visible
do_pattern: Use border-bottom or background highlight on active link
dont_pattern: Leave all nav items same style — user cant tell where they are

rule: Mobile nav must work without hover
do_pattern: Use hamburger menu with full-screen overlay on mobile
dont_pattern: Horizontal scrolling nav on mobile destroys usability

rule: Sticky nav must not cover content
do_pattern: Add padding-top equal to nav height
dont_pattern: Content hidden behind fixed navbar makes page unusable

rule: Labels must always be visible — never only placeholders
do_pattern: Use label element above every input
dont_pattern: Placeholder-only fields lose label when user types

rule: Validation errors must show inline next to the field
do_pattern: Show error message directly below the relevant input
dont_pattern: Show all errors only in a top banner — user must hunt for mistake

rule: CTA button must reflect loading state
do_pattern: Disable button and show spinner during submission
dont_pattern: Button stays active during submission — double-submit bug

rule: All interactive elements need cursor:pointer
do_pattern: Add cursor-pointer to every clickable div/span/button
dont_pattern: Clickable elements without pointer cursor confuse users

rule: Color alone must not convey meaning
do_pattern: Combine color with icon or text label for status
dont_pattern: Green=good Red=bad with no other indicator — fails colorblind users

rule: Focus states must be visible
do_pattern: Never remove outline — override with custom visible focus style
dont_pattern: Removing outline without replacement breaks keyboard nav

rule: Minimum touch target 44x44px on mobile
do_pattern: Use min-h-11 min-w-11 on all mobile buttons
dont_pattern: Tiny 24px buttons impossible to tap on mobile

rule: Respect prefers-reduced-motion
do_pattern: Wrap animations in media query
dont_pattern: Animate everything regardless of user accessibility settings

rule: Animation duration must feel natural
do_pattern: Use 150-300ms for micro-interactions 400-600ms for page transitions
dont_pattern: Instant state changes feel broken; >1s feels sluggish

rule: Hover effects must not shift layout
do_pattern: Use transform/opacity only — never margin/padding for hover states
dont_pattern: Hover that increases padding or changes element size shifts layout

rule: Minimum body font size 16px
do_pattern: Set base font size 16px on body element
dont_pattern: 12-14px body text fails readability standards on any screen

rule: Line height must aid readability
do_pattern: Use 1.5-1.7 line height for body text
dont_pattern: Single or 1.1 line height makes body text unreadable

rule: Heading hierarchy must be semantic
do_pattern: Use h1 h2 h3 in correct order — one h1 per page
dont_pattern: Multiple h1 tags or skipping heading levels breaks screen readers

rule: Text contrast ratio minimum 4.5:1
do_pattern: Check all text/background combinations in Figma or browser devtools
do_code: Dark text #1E293B on #F8FAFC bg = 13:1 ratio — excellent
dont_pattern: Light gray on white fails minimum standards

rule: Never use pure white text on gradient
do_pattern: Add text-shadow or semi-dark overlay behind gradient text
dont_pattern: Pure white on colorful gradient often fails contrast test

rule: Always show loading state for async operations
do_pattern: Use skeleton screens for initial load; spinner for actions
dont_pattern: Empty page during load makes users think app is broken

rule: Skeleton screens better than spinners for layout
do_pattern: Use skeleton matching exact shape of content to load
dont_pattern: Single spinner for entire page load gives no layout preview

rule: Content must not cause horizontal scroll
do_pattern: Never use fixed pixel widths wider than viewport
dont_pattern: Fixed 1000px tables on mobile break entire page layout

rule: Modals must be full-screen on mobile
do_pattern: Use bottom sheet pattern on mobile for modals
dont_pattern: Desktop modal centered on mobile — too small with tiny buttons
